tagline: A lightweight Windows tray app to track your gaming time, sessions, and statistics — completely offline and portable.

features.title: Auto Time Tracking
features.description: Tracks playtime & sessions, strips idle time automatically

features.title: In-Depth Statistics
features.description: Lifetime, monthly & yearly breakdowns plus cost-per-hour analysis

features.title: PC & Emulators
features.description: Track PC & Emulated games. Supports Retroarch and Standalone Emulators.

features.title: Offline & Private
features.description: No cloud, no accounts — data lives completely offline in local SQLite database

slides.title: Automatic Time Tracking
slides.description: Tracks playtime and session history for PC and emulated games. Detects and removes idle time automatically. Register any emulator once and all its ROMs are tracked forever.

slides.title: In-Depth Statistics
slides.description: Lifetime summaries, monthly and yearly breakdowns, most-played games, and value-for-money analysis. See exactly how much your gaming PC costs per hour of fun.

slides.title: Fast Browser UI
slides.description: Search, sort, and manage your entire library. Mark games as Playing, Finished, On Hold, or Dropped to stay on top of your backlog. Integrated Google image search for box art.

slides.title: Sessions History
slides.description: Have a record of every single session you played.
